corelogic_v10391

For Boolean variables $p,q,r,s,t\in\{0,1\}$ define  
$$
H(p,q,r,s,t)=\bigl[(p\oplus q)\oplus(r\to s)\bigr]\land\bigl[(s\oplus t)\to((\lnot p)\oplus r)\bigr],
$$
where $\oplus$ is exclusive–or.

Keep only those valuations with $H(p,q,r,s,t)=1$ and $p+q+r+s+t$ odd.  
Assign to each such valuation the integer  
$$
M=16p+8q+4r+2s+t.
$$
Calculate  
$$
\Sigma=\sum(13M+7)\pmod{997}.
$$

841
